mapper.select:
select spu_stock_key as stock_key, spu_id, null as sku_id, seller_id, seller_no, seller_name, system_spu_code, null as system_sku_code, product_name, main_image_url, null as sku_name, null as sku_image_url, sku_count, warehouse_kind_summary, warehouse_count, platform_total_qty, platform_available_qty, platform_reserved_qty, platform_in_transit_qty, source_total_qty, source_available_qty, source_in_transit_qty, inventory_status, sync_mode_summary, sync_policy_scope_summary, latest_source_snapshot_time, latest_stock_update_time from inventory_overview_spu_read_model
order by latest_stock_update_time desc, spu_id desc

select sku_stock_key as stock_key, spu_id, sku_id, seller_id, seller_no, seller_name, null as system_spu_code, system_sku_code, product_name, null as main_image_url, sku_name, sku_image_url, null as sku_count, warehouse_kind_summary, warehouse_count, platform_total_qty, platform_available_qty, platform_reserved_qty, platform_in_transit_qty, source_total_qty, source_available_qty, source_in_transit_qty, inventory_status, sync_mode_summary, sync_policy_scope_summary, latest_source_snapshot_time, latest_stock_update_time from inventory_overview_sku_read_model
order by latest_stock_update_time desc, sku_id desc

where.if: and concat_ws('|', sws.warehouse_kind, sws.warehouse_ref_type, coalesce(sws.warehouse_id, ''), coalesce(sws.warehouse_name, '')) = #{warehouseKey}
and concat_ws(' ', sws.system_sku_code, sws.warehouse_name, sws.warehouse_code, srm.search_text, srm.seller_name, srm.seller_no) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')

mapper.select:
select sws.*, srm.seller_no, srm.seller_name, srm.product_name, srm.sku_name, srm.sku_image_url from inventory_sku_warehouse_stock sws left join inventory_overview_sku_read_model srm on srm.sku_id = sws.sku_id
order by sws.update_time desc, sws.sku_id desc, case sws.warehouse_kind when 'official' then 1 else 2 end, sws.warehouse_name asc, sws.stock_id asc

select value, label, warehouse_kind, warehouse_ref_type, warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, search_text from ( select distinct concat_ws('|', sws.warehouse_kind, sws.warehouse_ref_type, coalesce(sws.warehouse_id, ''), coalesce(sws.warehouse_name, '')) as value, case when sws.warehouse_kind = 'third_party' and nullif(sws.warehouse_code, '') is not null then concat(sws.warehouse_name, ' / ', sws.warehouse_code) else sws.warehouse_name end as label, sws.warehouse_kind, sws.warehouse_ref_type, sws.warehouse_id, sws.warehouse_code, sws.warehouse_name, concat_ws(' ', sws.warehouse_name, sws.warehouse_code, sws.source_master_warehouse_name, sws.warehouse_kind) as search_text, case sws.warehouse_kind when 'official' then 1 when 'third_party' then 2 else 3 end as sort_order from inventory_sku_warehouse_stock sws where nullif(sws.warehouse_name, '') is not null ) option_rows order by sort_order asc, warehouse_name asc, warehouse_code asc

select concat_ws('|', w.warehouse_kind, 'OFFICIAL_MASTER', '', w.warehouse_name) as value, case when nullif(w.warehouse_code, '') is not null then concat(w.warehouse_name, ' / ', w.warehouse_code) else w.warehouse_name end as label, w.warehouse_kind, 'OFFICIAL_MASTER' as warehouse_ref_type, w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, concat_ws(' ', w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_code, w.country_code, w.state_province, w.city) as search_text from warehouse w where w.warehouse_kind = 'official' and w.status = '0' order by w.warehouse_name asc, w.warehouse_code asc, w.warehouse_id asc

select value, label, seller_id, seller_no, seller_name, search_text from ( select distinct s.seller_id as value, s.seller_id, coalesce(s.seller_no, '') as seller_no, coalesce(s.seller_name, '') as seller_name, case when nullif(s.seller_no, '') is not null then concat(coalesce(nullif(s.seller_short_name, ''), nullif(s.seller_name, ''), concat('卖家', s.seller_id)), ' / ', s.seller_no) else coalesce(nullif(s.seller_short_name, ''), nullif(s.seller_name, ''), concat('卖家', s.seller_id)) end as label, concat_ws(' ', s.seller_id, s.seller_no, s.seller_code, s.seller_name, s.seller_short_name) as search_text from seller s where s.status = '0' ) option_rows order by seller_name asc, seller_no asc, seller_id asc

select sws.*, srm.seller_no, srm.seller_name, srm.product_name, srm.sku_name, srm.sku_image_url from inventory_sku_warehouse_stock sws left join inventory_overview_sku_read_model srm on srm.sku_id = sws.sku_id where sws.sku_id = #{skuId} order by case sws.warehouse_kind when 'official' then 1 else 2 end, sws.warehouse_name asc, sws.stock_id asc

select sws.*, srm.seller_no, srm.seller_name, srm.product_name, srm.sku_name, srm.sku_image_url from inventory_sku_warehouse_stock sws left join inventory_overview_sku_read_model srm on srm.sku_id = sws.sku_id where sws.spu_id = #{spuId} order by sws.sku_id desc, case sws.warehouse_kind when 'official' then 1 else 2 end, sws.warehouse_name asc, sws.stock_id asc

select sws.*, srm.seller_no, srm.seller_name, srm.product_name, srm.sku_name, srm.sku_image_url from inventory_sku_warehouse_stock sws left join inventory_overview_sku_read_model srm on srm.sku_id = sws.sku_id where sws.stock_id = #{stockId}
mapper.update: update inventory_sku_warehouse_stock set platform_total_qty = #{platformTotalQty}, platform_reserved_qty = #{platformReservedQty}, platform_in_transit_qty = #{platformInTransitQty}, pending_available_inbound_qty = #{pendingAvailableInboundQty}, pending_source_deduction_qty = #{pendingSourceDeductionQty}, platform_available_qty = #{platformAvailableQty}, effective_status = #{effectiveStatus}, sync_mode = #{syncMode}, sync_policy_id = #{syncPolicyId}, sync_policy_scope = #{syncPolicyScope}, sync_policy_key = #{syncPolicyKey}, sync_status = #{syncStatus}, last_auto_sync_time = #{lastAutoSyncTime}, calc_time = #{calcTime}, version = version + 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where stock_id = #{stockId} and version = #{version}
mapper.insert: insert into inventory_stock_ledger( stock_id, stock_key, spu_id, sku_id, seller_id, sync_policy_id, sync_policy_scope, sync_policy_key, warehouse_kind, warehouse_ref_type, warehouse_name, operation_type, operation_source, biz_type, biz_no, delta_qty, before_platform_total_qty, after_platform_total_qty, before_available_qty, after_available_qty, before_reserved_qty, after_reserved_qty, before_in_transit_qty, after_in_transit_qty, risk_confirmed, risk_message, reason, operator_id, operator_name, operate_time, create_time, remark ) values ( #{stockId}, #{stockKey}, #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{sellerId}, #{syncPolicyId}, coalesce(#{syncPolicyScope}, ''), coalesce(#{syncPolicyKey}, ''), #{warehouseKind}, #{warehouseRefType}, #{warehouseName}, #{operationType}, #{operationSource}, #{bizType}, coalesce(#{bizNo}, ''), #{deltaQty}, #{beforePlatformTotalQty}, #{afterPlatformTotalQty}, #{beforeAvailableQty}, #{afterAvailableQty}, #{beforeReservedQty}, #{afterReservedQty}, #{beforeInTransitQty}, #{afterInTransitQty}, #{riskConfirmed}, coalesce(#{riskMessage}, ''), coalesce(#{reason}, ''), #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{operateTime}, sysdate(), '' )
mapper.sql:
select null as repository_scope, null as master_sku, null as master_product_name, null as master_warehouse_name, 0 as source_total_qty, 0 as source_available_qty, 0 as source_in_transit_qty, null as source_snapshot_time where 1 = 0
union all
select #{sourceStock.sourceScope} as repository_scope, #{sourceStock.masterSku} as master_sku, #{sourceStock.masterProductName} as master_product_name, #{sourceStock.masterWarehouseName} as master_warehouse_name, #{sourceStock.sourceTotalQty} as source_total_qty, #{sourceStock.sourceAvailableQty} as source_available_qty, #{sourceStock.sourceInTransitQty} as source_in_transit_qty, #{sourceStock.sourceSnapshotTime} as source_snapshot_time

select null as spu_id, null as sku_id, null as seller_id, null as seller_no, null as seller_name, null as system_spu_code, null as seller_spu_code, null as system_sku_code, null as seller_sku_code, null as product_name, null as product_name_en, null as main_image_url, null as sku_image_url, null as color, null as size, null as model where 1 = 0
union all
select #{sku.spuId} as spu_id, #{sku.skuId} as sku_id, #{sku.sellerId} as seller_id, #{sku.sellerNo} as seller_no, #{sku.sellerName} as seller_name, #{sku.systemSpuCode} as system_spu_code, #{sku.sellerSpuCode} as seller_spu_code, #{sku.systemSkuCode} as system_sku_code, #{sku.sellerSkuCode} as seller_sku_code, #{sku.productName} as product_name, #{sku.productNameEn} as product_name_en, #{sku.mainImageUrl} as main_image_url, #{sku.skuImageUrl} as sku_image_url, #{sku.color} as color, #{sku.size} as size, #{sku.model} as model

select null as sku_id, null as source_scope, null as master_sku, null as master_product_name where 1 = 0
union all
select #{binding.skuId} as sku_id, #{binding.sourceScope} as source_scope, #{binding.masterSku} as master_sku, #{binding.masterProductName} as master_product_name

select null as spu_id, null as warehouse_id, null as warehouse_kind, null as warehouse_code, null as warehouse_name where 1 = 0
union all
select #{warehouse.spuId} as spu_id, #{warehouse.warehouseId} as warehouse_id, #{warehouse.warehouseKind} as warehouse_kind, #{warehouse.warehouseCode} as warehouse_code, #{warehouse.warehouseName} as warehouse_name
mapper.insert:
insert into inventory_overview_sku_read_model( sku_stock_key, spu_id, sku_id, seller_id, seller_no, seller_name, system_sku_code, product_name, sku_name, sku_image_url, warehouse_kind_summary, warehouse_count, platform_total_qty, platform_available_qty, platform_reserved_qty, platform_in_transit_qty, source_total_qty, source_available_qty, source_in_transit_qty, inventory_status, latest_source_snapshot_time, latest_stock_update_time, sync_mode_summary, sync_policy_scope_summary, search_text, rebuild_time ) select concat('SKU:', sk.sku_id), sk.spu_id, sk.sku_id, sk.seller_id, coalesce(sk.seller_no, ''), coalesce(sk.seller_name, ''), sk.system_sku_code, sk.product_name, trim(concat_ws(' / ', nullif(sk.color, ''), nullif(sk.size, ''), nullif(sk.model, ''))), coalesce(sk.sku_image_url, ''), case when count(st.stock_id) = 0 then 'unconfigured' when count(distinct st.warehouse_kind) = 1 then min(st.warehouse_kind) else 'MIXED' end, count(st.stock_id), sum(coalesce(st.platform_total_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(st.platform_available_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(st.platform_reserved_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(st.platform_in_transit_qty, 0)), sum(case when st.warehouse_kind = 'official' then coalesce(st.source_total_qty, 0) else 0 end), sum(case when st.warehouse_kind = 'official' then coalesce(st.source_available_qty, 0) else 0 end), sum(case when st.warehouse_kind = 'official' then coalesce(st.source_in_transit_qty, 0) else 0 end), case when sum(coalesce(st.platform_available_qty, 0)) > 0 then 'IN_STOCK' when count(st.stock_id) = 0 then 'NO_WAREHOUSE' when sum(case when st.effective_status = 'NO_WAREHOUSE' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'NO_WAREHOUSE' when sum(case when st.effective_status = 'SOURCE_UNBOUND' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'SOURCE_UNBOUND' when sum(case when st.effective_status = 'SOURCE_ONLY_IN_TRANSIT' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'SOURCE_ONLY_IN_TRANSIT' when sum(case when st.effective_status = 'NO_SOURCE' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'NO_SOURCE' else 'OUT_OF_STOCK' end, max(st.source_snapshot_time), max(st.update_time), case when count(st.stock_id) = 0 then 'MANUAL' when count(distinct coalesce(st.sync_mode, 'MANUAL')) = 1 then min(coalesce(st.sync_mode, 'MANUAL')) else 'MIXED' end, case when count(st.stock_id) = 0 then 'SYSTEM' when count(distinct coalesce(st.sync_policy_scope, 'SYSTEM')) = 1 then min(coalesce(st.sync_policy_scope, 'SYSTEM')) else 'MIXED' end, concat_ws(' ', sk.system_spu_code, sk.product_name, sk.seller_no, sk.seller_name, sk.system_sku_code, sk.seller_sku_code, sk.color, sk.size, sk.model), sysdate() from (
) sk left join inventory_sku_warehouse_stock st on st.sku_id = sk.sku_id where sk.sku_id = #{skuId} group by sk.sku_id, sk.spu_id, sk.seller_id, sk.seller_no, sk.seller_name, sk.system_sku_code, sk.product_name, sk.sku_image_url, sk.color, sk.size, sk.model, sk.system_spu_code, sk.seller_sku_code on duplicate key update spu_id = values(spu_id), seller_id = values(seller_id), seller_no = values(seller_no), seller_name = values(seller_name), system_sku_code = values(system_sku_code), product_name = values(product_name), sku_name = values(sku_name), sku_image_url = values(sku_image_url), warehouse_kind_summary = values(warehouse_kind_summary), warehouse_count = values(warehouse_count), platform_total_qty = values(platform_total_qty), platform_available_qty = values(platform_available_qty), platform_reserved_qty = values(platform_reserved_qty), platform_in_transit_qty = values(platform_in_transit_qty), source_total_qty = values(source_total_qty), source_available_qty = values(source_available_qty), source_in_transit_qty = values(source_in_transit_qty), inventory_status = values(inventory_status), latest_source_snapshot_time = values(latest_source_snapshot_time), latest_stock_update_time = values(latest_stock_update_time), sync_mode_summary = values(sync_mode_summary), sync_policy_scope_summary = values(sync_policy_scope_summary), search_text = values(search_text), rebuild_time = sysdate()

insert into inventory_overview_spu_read_model( spu_stock_key, spu_id, seller_id, seller_no, seller_name, system_spu_code, product_name, main_image_url, sku_count, warehouse_kind_summary, warehouse_count, platform_total_qty, platform_available_qty, platform_reserved_qty, platform_in_transit_qty, source_total_qty, source_available_qty, source_in_transit_qty, inventory_status, latest_source_snapshot_time, latest_stock_update_time, sync_mode_summary, sync_policy_scope_summary, search_text, rebuild_time ) select concat('SPU:', sk.spu_id), sk.spu_id, sk.seller_id, coalesce(sk.seller_no, ''), coalesce(sk.seller_name, ''), sk.system_spu_code, sk.product_name, coalesce(sk.main_image_url, ''), count(distinct sk.sku_id), case when count(distinct srm.warehouse_kind_summary) = 1 then min(srm.warehouse_kind_summary) else 'MIXED' end, sum(coalesce(srm.warehouse_count, 0)), sum(coalesce(srm.platform_total_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(srm.platform_available_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(srm.platform_reserved_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(srm.platform_in_transit_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(srm.source_total_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(srm.source_available_qty, 0)), sum(coalesce(srm.source_in_transit_qty, 0)), case when sum(coalesce(srm.platform_available_qty, 0)) > 0 then 'IN_STOCK' when sum(case when srm.inventory_status = 'NO_WAREHOUSE' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'NO_WAREHOUSE' when sum(case when srm.inventory_status = 'SOURCE_UNBOUND' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'SOURCE_UNBOUND' when sum(case when srm.inventory_status = 'SOURCE_ONLY_IN_TRANSIT' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'SOURCE_ONLY_IN_TRANSIT' when sum(case when srm.inventory_status = 'NO_SOURCE' then 1 else 0 end) > 0 then 'NO_SOURCE' else 'OUT_OF_STOCK' end, max(srm.latest_source_snapshot_time), max(srm.latest_stock_update_time), case when count(distinct srm.sync_mode_summary) = 1 then min(srm.sync_mode_summary) else 'MIXED' end, case when count(distinct srm.sync_policy_scope_summary) = 1 then min(srm.sync_policy_scope_summary) else 'MIXED' end, concat_ws(' ', sk.system_spu_code, sk.seller_spu_code, sk.product_name, sk.product_name_en, sk.seller_name), sysdate() from (
) sk join inventory_overview_sku_read_model srm on srm.sku_id = sk.sku_id where sk.spu_id = #{spuId} group by sk.spu_id, sk.seller_id, sk.seller_no, sk.seller_name, sk.system_spu_code, sk.product_name, sk.main_image_url, sk.seller_spu_code, sk.product_name_en on duplicate key update seller_id = values(seller_id), seller_no = values(seller_no), seller_name = values(seller_name), system_spu_code = values(system_spu_code), product_name = values(product_name), main_image_url = values(main_image_url), sku_count = values(sku_count), warehouse_kind_summary = values(warehouse_kind_summary), warehouse_count = values(warehouse_count), platform_total_qty = values(platform_total_qty), platform_available_qty = values(platform_available_qty), platform_reserved_qty = values(platform_reserved_qty), platform_in_transit_qty = values(platform_in_transit_qty), source_total_qty = values(source_total_qty), source_available_qty = values(source_available_qty), source_in_transit_qty = values(source_in_transit_qty), inventory_status = values(inventory_status), latest_source_snapshot_time = values(latest_source_snapshot_time), latest_stock_update_time = values(latest_stock_update_time), sync_mode_summary = values(sync_mode_summary), sync_policy_scope_summary = values(sync_policy_scope_summary), search_text = values(search_text), rebuild_time = sysdate()
